content.query:
CREATE VIEW gold.calendar 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Calendar/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.customers 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Customers/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.prod_cat 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/Product_Categories/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.products 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Products/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.returns 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Returns/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.sales_15 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Sales_2015/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.sales_16
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Sales_2016/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.sales_17 
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Sales_2017/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.territories
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Territories/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1

CREATE VIEW gold.prod_subCat
AS
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(BULK'https://awstorageedataa.blob.core.windows.net/silver/Product_Subcategories/',FORMAT='PARQUET') as Quer1
